title: View from 18th Floor
content:
![View from 18th Floor](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2012/12/IMG_2332_s.jpg)

A view from 18th floor of Phayathai 3 hospital. You can see the new BTS extension in the horizon.

(The images was taken in parts with iPhone Camera.app and stitched with AutoStich.)
